des.mcsp.120mm_bulletmortar: Heavy mortar round for indirect fire support. Brings the rain.
des.mcsp.125mm_ap: APFSDS rounds for main battle tanks. A tungsten dart traveling at 1,700 m/s tends to ruin someone's day.
des.mcsp.125mm_he: HE-FRAG rounds for main battle tanks. When you need to redecorate a building... from the outside.
des.mcsp.25mm_ap: Standard ammunition for Western autocannons like the M242 Bushmaster. Effective against light armor and infantry positions.
des.mcsp.30mm_ap: Standard ammunition for Eastern autocannons like the 2A42. Packs more punch than its Western counterpart.
des.mcsp.40mm_explosive: Grenade launcher HE round. Makes short work of soft targets.
des.mcsp.40mm_smoke: Deploys a smoke screen for tactical concealment. Your enemies can't hit what they can't see.
des.mcsp.airframe_helmet: Lightweight ballistic helmet with modular rail system. Keeps your head intact while looking tactical.
des.mcsp.bmd_4_camo_spawn_item: The BMD-4 is a Russian airborne infantry fighting vehicle, designed to be air-dropped with paratroopers. Armed with a 100mm gun capable of firing ATGMs and a coaxial 30mm autocannon. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.bmd_4_spawn_item: The BMD-4 is a Russian airborne infantry fighting vehicle, designed to be air-dropped with paratroopers. Armed with a 100mm gun capable of firing ATGMs and a coaxial 30mm autocannon, it packs serious firepower into a lightweight chassis. Perfect for rapid deployment and aggressive flanking maneuvers.
des.mcsp.bullet762: 7.62mm ammunition for coaxial machine guns. Keeps infantry honest.
des.mcsp.helmettor_helmet: Russian ballistic helmet. Simple, effective, and doesn't care about your fashion sense.
des.mcsp.humvee_carc_spawn_item: The HMMWV, better known as the Humvee, is the backbone of American military logistics. This variant features a Remote Weapon Station with a .50 cal machine gun. CARC (Chemical Agent Resistant Coating) camouflage provides protection against chemical agents while blending into woodland terrain.
des.mcsp.humvee_sand_spawn_item: The HMMWV, better known as the Humvee, is the backbone of American military logistics. This variant features a Remote Weapon Station with a .50 cal machine gun. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.humvee_standart_spawn_item: The HMMWV, better known as the Humvee, is the backbone of American military logistics. This variant features a Remote Weapon Station with a .50 cal machine gun, providing suppressive fire without exposing the gunner. Fast, versatile, and battle-proven since 1984.
des.mcsp.m1a2_sand_spawn_item: The M1A2 Abrams is the pride of American armored forces. Its 120mm M256 smoothbore cannon can defeat any armor at combat ranges, while the gas turbine engine pushes 70 tons to surprising speeds. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.m1a2_sep_sand_spawn_item: The M1A2 Abrams is the pride of American armored forces with its 120mm cannon and gas turbine engine. SEP adds improved thermal sights, digital systems, and enhanced armor. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.m1a2_sep_spawn_item: The M1A2 Abrams is the pride of American armored forces with its 120mm cannon and gas turbine engine. SEP (System Enhancement Package) adds improved thermal sights, digital systems, and enhanced armor. The commander's independent thermal viewer lets you find targets while the gunner engages another.
des.mcsp.m1a2_spawn_item: The M1A2 Abrams is the pride of American armored forces. Its 120mm M256 smoothbore cannon can defeat any armor at combat ranges, while the gas turbine engine pushes 70 tons to speeds that surprise everyone. Composite and depleted uranium armor makes it a tough nut to crack. The best choice when you need to make a statement.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_ii_sand_spawn: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle with 25mm autocannon and TOW missiles. BUSK II upgrade adds reactive armor tiles for improved protection against RPGs. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_ii_spawn_item: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle with 25mm autocannon and TOW missiles. BUSK II (Bradley Urban Survival Kit) upgrade adds reactive armor tiles for improved protection against RPGs and shaped charges in urban combat.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_iii_sand_spaw: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle with 25mm autocannon and TOW missiles. BUSK III features enhanced armor coverage and improved survivability systems. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_iii_spawn_ite: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle with 25mm autocannon and TOW missiles. BUSK III features enhanced armor coverage, improved survivability systems, and additional protection against IEDs and mines.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_sand_spawn_item: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle, serving as the eyes and ears of armored formations. Its 25mm M242 Bushmaster autocannon shreds light armor, while twin TOW missile launchers can take on main battle tanks. Desert sand camouflage for operations in arid environments.
des.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_spawn_item: The M3A3 Bradley is an American cavalry fighting vehicle, serving as the eyes and ears of armored formations. Its 25mm M242 Bushmaster autocannon shreds light armor, while twin TOW missile launchers can take on main battle tanks. Three crew plus scouts make it a mobile reconnaissance powerhouse.
des.mcsp.mlrs_shells: Thermobaric rocket for the TOS-1A system. Creates a vacuum effect that's... unpleasant for anyone nearby.
des.mcsp.opscore2_helmet: Maritime variant with improved drainage. For when you need to look cool while wet.
des.mcsp.opscore_helmet: High-cut ballistic helmet favored by special operations. Excellent hearing protection compatibility.
des.mcsp.sprut_camo_spawn_item: The 2S25 Sprut-SD is a Russian self-propelled anti-tank gun built for airborne forces. Its 125mm smoothbore cannon is identical to the one found on the T-90, giving paratroopers main battle tank firepower in an air-droppable package. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.sprut_spawn_item: The 2S25 Sprut-SD is a Russian self-propelled anti-tank gun built for airborne forces. Its 125mm smoothbore cannon is identical to the one found on the T-90, giving paratroopers main battle tank firepower in an air-droppable package. Light armor means you'll want to shoot first.
des.mcsp.t90a_green_spawn_item: The T-90A is a Russian third-generation main battle tank. Armed with a 125mm 2A46M-5 smoothbore gun capable of firing ATGMs through the barrel. The Shtora active protection system and Kontakt-5 ERA provide excellent survivability. Reliable and deadly.
des.mcsp.t90a_tricolor_spawn_item: The T-90A is a Russian third-generation main battle tank. Armed with a 125mm 2A46M-5 smoothbore gun capable of firing ATGMs through the barrel. The Shtora active protection system and Kontakt-5 ERA provide excellent survivability. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.tos_1a_green_spawn_item: The TOS-1A Solntsepyok is a Russian heavy flamethrower system that brings the sun to earth. Its 24 thermobaric rockets create devastating overpressure waves that can level fortifications and clear trenches. Built on a T-72 chassis for protection, but the exposed launcher makes it vulnerable. Best used from a safe distance... for everyone.
des.mcsp.tos_1a_tricolor_spawn_item: The TOS-1A Solntsepyok is a Russian heavy flamethrower system that brings the sun to earth. Its 24 thermobaric rockets create devastating overpressure waves that can level fortifications and clear trenches. Built on a T-72 chassis for protection, but the exposed launcher makes it vulnerable. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.tow_2: Wire-guided anti-tank missile. Point, shoot, guide, and watch the fireworks.
des.mcsp.typhoon_30_spawn_item: The Typhoon-K is a Russian MRAP designed for troop transport and patrol missions. Its 30mm remote turret provides solid firepower against light targets, while the armored hull keeps the crew safe from mines and small arms. A reliable workhorse for any modern battlefield.
des.mcsp.typhoon_tricolor_30_spawn_item: The Typhoon-K is a Russian MRAP designed for troop transport and patrol missions. Its 30mm remote turret provides solid firepower against light targets, while the armored hull keeps the crew safe from mines and small arms. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.ural_green_spawn_item: The Ural-4320 is a Soviet-era 6x6 military truck that refuses to die. Built to haul troops and cargo through the worst terrain imaginable, it's been the backbone of Eastern logistics for decades. Simple, rugged, and surprisingly comfortable for a military truck. Just don't expect air conditioning.
des.mcsp.ural_tricolor_spawn_item: The Ural-4320 is a Soviet-era 6x6 military truck that refuses to die. Built to haul troops and cargo through the worst terrain imaginable, it's been the backbone of Eastern logistics for decades. Tri-color camouflage variant for woodland operations.
des.mcsp.vest_avs: Adaptive Vest System plate carrier. Modular design for any mission profile.
des.mcsp.vest_cpc: Cage Plate Carrier with excellent load distribution. Your back will thank you.
des.mcsp.vest_cpc2: Updated CPC design with improved MOLLE coverage. More pouches, more problems solved.
entity.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_ii_sand: M3A3 Bradley BUSK II Sand Camo
entity.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_iii_sand: M3A3 Bradley BUSK III Sand Camo
item.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_ii_sand_spaw: M3A3 Bradley BUSK II Sand Camo
item.mcsp.m3a3_bradley_busk_iii_sand_spa: M3A3 Bradley BUSK III Sand Camo
tooltip.mcsp.usage_restriction: Usage of these models outside of the addon is prohibited
